name: Chest Lift
setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, knees bent, legs parallel and hip width apart, feet flat on Mat, holding one Magic Circle between knees and another between hands, arms straight and perpendicular

movement.action: Lift head and chest, press legs and arms together
Pause; lower head and chest, open legs and arms, return to start position

cues: Maintain pelvic lumbar stabilization
Keep head aligned with spine when lifting into spinal flexion
Maintain tension in both circles, increase tension when lifting

name: Arms Bent
setup: Standing, sitting, or kneeling, hands holding Magic Circle in front of chest at shoulder height, arms bent
cues: Maintain upright trunk
Maintain scapular stabilization
Maintain tension in circle, increase tension when pressing arms together

name: Arms Straight
setup: Starting in Arms Bent position, arms straight
cues: Maintain upright trunk
Maintain scapular stabilization
Maintain tension in circle, increase tension when pressing arms together
Keep arms straight

name: Arms Overhead
setup: Starting in Arms Bent position, arms straight and overhead
cues: Maintain upright trunk
Maintain scapular stabilization
Maintain tension in circle
Lift arms as high as flexibility of shoulders allow
Keep arms straight

name: Single Arm Side Press
setup: Standing or kneeling, holding Magic Circle in one hand, resting it against side of body

movement.action: Open arm; change arm after 5–10 repetitions

cues: Maintain scapular stabilization
Keep elbow slightly bent and facing outward
Maintain tension in circle, increase tension when pressing arm
Maintain slight internal rotation of shoulder

name: Single Arm Bicep
setup: Starting in Single Arm Side Press position, hand holding Magic Circle resting on shoulder

movement.action: Lift arm; change arm after 5–10 repetitions

cues: Press straight down, not at an angle
Press with palm of hand, not with fingers
Find comfortable position to rest Magic Circle on shoulder
Maintain tension in circle, increase tension when bending arm

name: Above Knees
setup: Sitting upright, legs bent, shins parallel, feet placed firmly on floor, Magic Circle above knees, perpendicular to floor
cues: Maintain trunk stabilization
Maintain tension in circle, increase tension when pressing legs together

name: Below Knees
setup: Sitting upright, legs bent, shins parallel, feet placed firmly on floor, Magic Circle below knees, parallel to floor
cues: Maintain trunk stabilization
Maintain tension in circle, increase tension when pressing legs together

name: Ankles
setup: Sitting upright, legs bent, shins parallel, feet placed firmly on floor, Magic Circle above ankles, parallel to floor
cues: Maximize engagement of intrinsic muscles of foot
Maintain trunk stabilization
Maintain tension in circle, increase tension when pressing together
Keep shins parallel as legs press together

name: Adductor Squeeze
setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, feet together, knees bent and apart, Magic Circle between knees
cues: Maintain neutral pelvis
Keep shoulders and neck relaxed
Maintain tension in circle, increase tension when pressing legs together

name: Knees
setup: Lying supine, legs in table top position, Magic Circle above knees, parallel to Mat
cues: Keep shins parallel to each other and to Mat
Keep thighs perpendicular to Mat (as close as possible)
Maintain pelvic lumbar stabilization
Maintain tension in circle, increase tension when pressing legs together

name: Ankles
setup: Starting in Knees position, legs straight on diagonal line, Magic Circle above ankles
cues: Keep legs at consistent height
Maintain pelvic lumbar stabilization
Maintain tension in circle, increase tension when pressing legs together

name: Ankles Bent Knees
setup: Lying prone, knees bent at 90 degrees, thighs lifted off Mat, feet plantarflexed, Magic Circle above ankles, head resting on back of hands
cues: Reach feet toward ceiling
Keep hips extended
Maintain abdominal support to avoid pressure on lower back
Maintain tension in circle, increase tension when pressing legs together

name: Ankles Straight Knees
setup: Starting in Ankles Bent Knees position, legs straight, thighs lifted off Mat, Magic Circle above ankles
cues: Keep legs straight
Keep hips extended
Maintain abdominal support to avoid pressure on lower back
Maintain tension in circle, increase tension when pressing legs together

name: Hamstrings
setup: Starting in Ankles Bent Knees position, one leg straight, other leg bent with thigh off Mat, Magic Circle below gluteals and under heel

movement.action: Straighten leg; change leg after 5–10 repetitions

cues: Keep legs together
Keep bent knee lifted throughout
Maintain abdominal support to avoid pressure on lower back
Maintain tension in circle, increase tension when bending leg

name: Swan 1
setup: Lying prone, arms straight overhead, Magic Circle between hands, parallel to Mat

movement.action: Lower trunk, return to start position

cues: Keep legs together (as close as possible)
Move arms and trunk as one unit
Keep head between arms
Keep legs on Mat
Maintain tension in circle

name: Swan 2
setup: Starting in Swan 1 position, Magic Circle between hands, perpendicular to Mat

movement.action: Lower trunk, return to start position

cues: Keep legs together (as close as possible)
Move arms and trunk as one unit
Keep legs on Mat
Maintain tension in circle
